title: l2_payload.json / announce_coords.json / compact_cot.json: Python-only or mirrored consumption
description: l2_payload.json: only Python consumes (test_vectors.py:97-100,130-142); Rust (lichen-core/src/l2_payload.rs) and C (l2_payload.h) semantics match the vectors exactly but tests don't read the JSON. announce_coords.json: only Python consumes (:109-112,174-185); C mirrors the Seattle e7 pair in meshtastic_gateway_adapter main.c:1524; Rust decode-only self-made values. compact_cot.json: Python direct, Rust transcribed mirror (compact_cot.rs:549-902), NO C implementation exists (see mmgu compact-cot bead). Low-risk but same drift-invisibility pattern. Fix: loaders or codegen checks in Rust/C.
